text.title: python-typing Failure Modes
text.summary: Six recurring antipatterns when adding type hints to Python 3.10+ codebases under mypy strict.

antipattern.description: Using `Any` (explicit or via `dict[str, Any]`) to silence mypy on unknown shapes instead of modeling the shape.
antipattern.reason: `Any` is compatible with every type; errors flow through silently. One `Any` return value propagates the gap to every caller in the chain. The static coverage that mypy claims to enforce is hollowed out.

antipattern.description: Returning `dict[str, Any]` from a cross-boundary function (HTTP handler, queue producer, config loader) instead of a `TypedDict`.
antipattern.reason: Dict-typed returns are the most common `Any` sink. The boundary is exactly where shape contracts matter most — once `Any` enters, every key access downstream is also `Any`. Replacing with `TypedDict` costs almost nothing and gives mypy visibility into every `payload["key"]` access.

antipattern.description: Adding `# type: ignore` without a rule code, e.g., `result = call() # type: ignore` instead of `# type: ignore[no-any-return]`.
antipattern.reason: Bare ignores silence all mypy errors on the line, including future ones unrelated to the original issue. A scoped code (`[attr-defined]`, `[no-any-return]`, `[arg-type]`) silences only the targeted error class. With `warn_unused_ignores = true`, scoped ignores even alert when the underlying bug is fixed; bare ignores never expire.

antipattern.description: Using `cast(SomeType, value)` to satisfy mypy instead of an `isinstance` / `assert` / `TypeIs` narrowing guard.
antipattern.reason: `cast()` is a compile-time lie — zero runtime check. If the actual type diverges, the bug propagates silently and surfaces deep in the stack as `AttributeError`. A narrowing guard combines type evidence with a real runtime check.

antipattern.description: Mixing `Optional[X]` with `X | None`, or `Union[X, Y]` with `X | Y`, inside the same codebase.
antipattern.reason: Mixed styles break grep workflows (you have to search twice), confuse ruff `--fix` idempotency, and obscure intent — readers cannot tell whether a file is "old" or "new" style. Enforce `X | None` everywhere via ruff UP007 and batch-migrate with `ruff check --select UP --fix`.

antipattern.description: Applying `@runtime_checkable` to a Protocol that is then used in `isinstance()` inside a tight loop or per-request middleware.
antipattern.reason: `isinstance(obj, SomeProtocol)` with `@runtime_checkable` performs structural-presence checks for every declared method, per call. It does not check signatures — only attribute existence — yet pays the introspection cost every time. On hot paths this is measurable; reserve it for infrequent dynamic dispatch.
